issue: Uses deprecated Vercel AI SDK ('ai', '@ai-sdk/openai') which is reported to crash on Windows.

recommendation: Uninstall these packages to reduce bundle size and maintenance overhead.

issue: Numerous stale log files and debug artifacts in the project root.
recommendation: Delete: ab-test-anthropic.json, ab-test-deep-dive.log, ab-test-deep-dive2.log, ab-test-deep-dive-utf8.log, ab-test-deep-dive2-utf8.log, ab-test-final.json, ab-test-results.json, ab-test-results-iteration-2.json, ai-debug.log, test-ai.log, build.log, tsc.log, worker.log, worker_debug.log.

issue: Missing real-time progress UI for batch uploads.
recommendation: Implement a polling mechanism or server-sent events to show progress (Queued/Processing/Complete) for items in the bulk upload queue.

issue: Missing one-click 'Retry' button for failed items.
recommendation: Add a button to retry processing for items with status='error'.
